mapper.select:
/* ====== cmn.filedown.getFileMgmtById =========*/
SELECT FILE_ID , MODULE_ID , FILE_NM , FILE_NM_PC , FILE_ROUT , FILE_SIZE , REGST_ID , REG_DTTM , RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM FROM CMN_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND MODULE_ID = #{moduleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO /* cmn.filedown.insertExcelDown */ MSP_BOND_EXCEL_MGMT (EXCEL_DOWN_SEQ_NUM , file_nm , file_path , regst_id , REGST_DTTM) VALUES (EXCEL_DOWN_SEQ.NEXTVAL , #{fileNm} , #{filePath} , #{loginId} , SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT /* cmn.filedown.selectExcelFilePath */ FILE_NM , FILE_PATH , REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI:SS') AS REGST_DTTM FROM MSP_BOND_EXCEL_MGMT WHERE 1 = 1 AND EXCEL_DOWN_SEQ_NUM = #{excelDownSeqNum}
